narration: Lemonade Change only needs to track how many 5-dollar and 10-dollar bills are available.
callout: The exact order of bills in your pocket does not matter. The counts do.

narration: For a 20-dollar bill, greedy prefers using 10 plus 5 when possible.
decision: Saving 5-dollar bills helps future customers more.

predictionPrompt.prompt: Why is 10 + 5 better than 5 + 5 + 5 when possible?

choices.label: It saves more 5-dollar bills for later
choices.feedback: Correct. Fives are the most flexible change bill here.

choices.label: It gives more total money back
choices.feedback: Not this one. Both choices give the same total amount.

narration: This greedy rule protects future flexibility by keeping more small bills available.
callout: That is the best-now choice in this problem.
